flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at The Master's University and Seminary rose 35% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.9k → $39.0k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at The Master's University and Seminary rose 33% between 2007 and 2010 ($9.0k → $12.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at The Master's University and Seminary fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (66.2% → 55.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at The Master's University and Seminary rose 16% between 2007 and 2010 ($22.1k → $25.6k).
